sEn: We identify that aliasing in GAN generators causes unhealthy dependence on absolute pixel coordinates, and propose small architectural changes to achieve translation and rotation equivariance.
sZh: 我们发现生成对抗网络中的混叠现象导致了对绝对像素坐标的不健康依赖，并提出了小的架构变化以实现平移和旋转等变性。
absEn: We observe that despite their hierarchical convolutional nature, the synthesis process of typical generative adversarial networks depends on absolute pixel coordinates in an unhealthy manner. This manifests itself as, e.g., detail appearing to be glued to image coordinates instead of the surfaces of depicted objects. We trace the root cause to careless signal processing that causes aliasing in the generator network. Interpreting all signals in the network as continuous, we derive generally applicable, small architectural changes that guarantee that unwanted information cannot leak into the hierarchical synthesis process. The resulting networks match the FID of StyleGAN2 but differ dramatically in their internal representations, and they are fully equivariant to translation and rotation even at subpixel scales. Our results pave the way for generative models better suited for video and animation.
absZh: 我们观察到，尽管典型的生成对抗网络具有分层卷积性质，但其合成过程以不健康的方式依赖于绝对像素坐标。这表现为细节似乎粘附在图像坐标上，而不是所描绘物体的表面。我们将根本原因追溯到粗心的信号处理，导致生成器网络中出现混叠。将网络中的所有信号解释为连续的，我们推导出普遍适用的小型架构变化，确保不需要的信息无法泄漏到分层合成过程中。由此产生的网络在FID上与StyleGAN2相当，但其内部表示却截然不同，并且在亚像素尺度上完全等变于平移和旋转。我们的结果为更适合视频和动画的生成模型铺平了道路。

contrib.en: Identified aliasing in GAN generators as root cause of texture sticking to pixel coordinates.
contrib.zh: 识别出GAN生成器中的混叠是纹理粘附于像素坐标的根本原因。

contrib.en: Proposed continuous signal interpretation and architectural changes to eliminate aliasing.
contrib.zh: 提出连续信号解释和架构修改以消除混叠。

contrib.en: Achieved full translation and rotation equivariance at subpixel scales in StyleGAN3.
contrib.zh: 在StyleGAN3中实现了亚像素级别的完全平移和旋转等变性。

contrib.en: Matched FID of StyleGAN2 while dramatically altering internal representations.
contrib.zh: 匹配StyleGAN2的FID，同时显著改变内部表示。

contrib.en: Paved way for generative models better suited for video and animation.
contrib.zh: 为更适合视频和动画的生成模型铺平道路。

contrib.en: Introduced practical approximations like 2x upsampling for nonlinearities and Kaiser-windowed filters.
contrib.zh: 引入实用近似，如非线性操作的2倍上采样和Kaiser窗滤波器。

limits.en: Assumes training data is properly antialiased; aliased data (e.g., pixel art) causes difficulties.
limits.zh: 假设训练数据已正确抗混叠；混叠数据（如像素艺术）会导致困难。

limits.en: Rotation equivariance requires 1x1 convolutions and radially symmetric filters, limiting capacity.
limits.zh: 旋转等变性需要1x1卷积和径向对称滤波器，限制了容量。

limits.en: Equivariance metrics may not fully capture perceptual quality; FID trade-offs exist.
limits.zh: 等变性指标可能无法完全捕捉感知质量；存在FID权衡。

limits.en: Generator modifications only; discriminator not made equivariant, potentially limiting performance.
limits.zh: 仅修改生成器；判别器未实现等变性，可能限制性能。

limits.en: Higher computational cost due to custom CUDA kernels and larger filters.
limits.zh: 由于自定义CUDA内核和更大滤波器，计算成本更高。

items.en: We observe that despite their hierarchical convolutional nature, the synthesis process of typical generative adversarial networks depends on absolute pixel coordinates in an unhealthy manner. This manifests itself as, e.g., detail appearing to be glued to image coordinates instead of the surfaces of depicted objects. We trace the root cause to careless signal processing that causes aliasing in the generator network. Interpreting all signals in the network as continuous, we derive generally applicable, small architectural changes that guarantee that unwanted information cannot leak into the hierarchical synthesis process. The resulting networks match the FID of StyleGAN2 but differ dramatically in their internal representations, and they are fully equivariant to translation and rotation even at subpixel scales. Our results pave the way for generative models better suited for video and animation.
items.zh: 我们观察到，尽管典型的生成对抗网络具有分层卷积性质，但其合成过程以不健康的方式依赖于绝对像素坐标。这表现为例如细节似乎粘附在图像坐标上，而非所描绘对象的表面。我们将根本原因追溯到导致生成器网络中混叠的粗心信号处理。将网络中的所有信号解释为连续的，我们推导出普遍适用的小型架构更改，这些更改保证不需要的信息无法泄漏到分层合成过程中。由此产生的网络在FID上与StyleGAN2相当，但其内部表示截然不同，并且在亚像素尺度上完全等变于平移和旋转。我们的结果为更适合视频和动画的生成模型铺平了道路。

items.en: The resolution and quality of images produced by generative adversarial networks (GAN) [21] have seen rapid improvement recently [31, 11, 33, 34]. They have been used for a variety of applications, including image editing [49, 55, 43, 22, 39, 3], domain translation [70, 37, 61, 42], and video generation [57, 15, 24]. While several ways of controlling the generative process have been found [8, 29, 10, 42, 25, 2, 7, 48, 6], the foundations of the synthesis process remain only partially understood.
items.zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）[21]生成的图像分辨率和质量最近得到了快速提升[31, 11, 33, 34]。它们已被用于多种应用，包括图像编辑[49, 55, 43, 22, 39, 3]、域迁移[70, 37, 61, 42]和视频生成[57, 15, 24]。尽管已经发现了多种控制生成过程的方法[8, 29, 10, 42, 25, 2, 7, 48, 6]，但合成过程的基础仍仅被部分理解。

items.en: In the real world, details of different scale tend to transform hierarchically. For instance, moving a head causes the nose to move, which in turn moves the skin pores on it. The structure of a typical GAN generator is analogous: coarse, low-resolution features are hierarchically refined by upsampling layers, locally mixed by convolutions, and new detail is introduced through nonlinearities. We observe that despite this superficial similarity, current GAN architectures do not synthesize images in a natural hierarchical manner: the coarse features mainly control the presence of finer features, but not their precise positions. Instead, much of the fine detail appears to be fixed in pixel coordinates. This disturbing “texture sticking” is clearly visible in latent interpolations (see Figure 1 and our accompanying videos on the project page https://nvlabs.github.io/stylegan3), breaking the illusion of a solid and coherent object moving in space. Our goal is an architecture that exhibits a more natural transformation hierarchy, where the exact sub-pixel position of each feature is exclusively inherited from the underlying coarse features.
items.zh: 在现实世界中，不同尺度的细节倾向于分层变换。例如，移动头部会导致鼻子移动，进而移动其上的皮肤毛孔。典型GAN生成器的结构是类似的：粗尺度、低分辨率的特征通过上采样层分层细化，通过卷积局部混合，并通过非线性引入新细节。我们观察到，尽管存在这种表面相似性，当前的GAN架构并未以自然的分层方式合成图像：粗特征主要控制更细特征的存在，而非其精确位置。相反，许多精细细节似乎固定在像素坐标上。这种令人不安的“纹理粘附”在潜在插值中清晰可见（参见图1和我们在项目页面https://nvlabs.github.io/stylegan3上的配套视频），打破了空间中固体且连贯物体移动的幻觉。我们的目标是构建一种展现出更自然变换层次结构的架构，其中每个特征的精确亚像素位置完全继承自底层粗特征。

items.en: It turns out that current networks can partially bypass the ideal hierarchical construction by drawing on unintentional positional references available to the intermediate layers through image borders [28, 35, 66], per-pixel noise inputs [33] and positional encodings, and aliasing [5, 69]. Aliasing, despite being a subtle and critical issue [44], has received little attention in the GAN literature. We identify two sources for it: 1) faint after-images of the pixel grid resulting from non-ideal upsampling filters111Consider nearest neighbor upsampling. If we upsample a 4×\times4 image to 8×\times8, the original pixels will be clearly visible, allowing one to reliably distinguish between even and odd pixels. Since the same is true on all scales, this (leaked) information makes it possible to reconstruct even the absolute pixel coordinates. With better filters such as bilinear or bicubic, the clues get less pronounced, but are nevertheless evident for the generator. such as nearest, bilinear, or strided convolutions, and 2) the pointwise application of nonlinearities such as ReLU [60] or swish [47]. We find that the network has the means and motivation to amplify even the slightest amount of aliasing and combining it over multiple scales allows it to build a basis for texture motifs that are fixed in screen coordinates. This holds for all filters commonly used in deep learning [69, 59], and even high-quality filters used in image processing.
items.zh: 事实证明，当前网络可以通过利用图像边界[28, 35, 66]、逐像素噪声输入[33]和位置编码以及混叠[5, 69]为中间层提供的无意位置参考，部分绕过理想的分层构建。混叠尽管是一个微妙且关键的问题[44]，但在GAN文献中很少受到关注。我们识别出两个来源：1）非理想上采样滤波器（例如最近邻、双线性或步长卷积）导致的像素网格微弱残像，以及2）逐点应用非线性（如ReLU[60]或swish[47]）。我们发现网络有手段和动机放大即使是微量的混叠，并将其在多个尺度上组合，从而为固定在屏幕坐标中的纹理图案构建基础。这对于深度学习中常用的所有滤波器[69, 59]以及图像处理中使用的高质量滤波器都成立。

items.en: How, then, do we eliminate the unwanted side information and thereby stop the network from using it? While borders can be solved by simply operating on slightly larger images, aliasing is much harder. We begin by noting that aliasing is most naturally treated in the classical Shannon-Nyquist signal processing framework, and switch focus to bandlimited functions on a continuous domain that are merely represented by discrete sample grids. Now, successful elimination of all sources of positional references means that details can be generated equally well regardless of pixel coordinates, which in turn is equivalent to enforcing continuous equivariance to sub-pixel translation (and optionally rotation) in all layers. To achieve this, we describe a comprehensive overhaul of all signal processing aspects of the StyleGAN2 generator [34]. Our contributions include the surprising finding that current upsampling filters are simply not aggressive enough in suppressing aliasing, and that extremely high-quality filters with over 100dB attenuation are required. Further, we present a principled solution to aliasing caused by pointwise nonlinearities [5] by considering their effect in the continuous domain and appropriately low-pass filtering the results. We also show that after the overhaul, a model based on 1×\times1 convolutions yields a strong, rotation equivariant generator.
items.zh: 那么，我们如何消除不需要的侧信息，从而阻止网络使用它呢？虽然边界可以通过简单地在稍大的图像上操作来解决，但混叠要困难得多。我们首先注意到，混叠在经典的Shannon-Nyquist信号处理框架中最自然地处理，并将焦点转移到连续域中仅由离散样本网格表示的带限函数。现在，成功消除所有位置参考源意味着无论像素坐标如何，细节都能同样好地生成，这反过来等同于在所有层中强制执行对亚像素平移（以及可选的旋转）的连续等变性。为了实现这一点，我们描述了StyleGAN2生成器[34]所有信号处理方面的全面改革。我们的贡献包括令人惊讶的发现：当前的上采样滤波器在抑制混叠方面不够激进，需要超过100dB衰减的极高品质滤波器。此外，我们提出了一种原则性解决方案，通过考虑非线性在连续域中的影响并适当低通滤波结果，来解决逐点非线性[5]引起的混叠。我们还表明，在改革之后，基于1×1卷积的模型产生了一个强大的旋转等变生成器。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Examples of “texture sticking”. Left: The average of images generated from a small neighborhood around a central latent (top row). The intended result is uniformly blurry because all details should move together. However, with StyleGAN2 many details (e.g., fur) stick to the same pixel coordinates, showing unwanted sharpness. Right: From a latent space interpolation (top row), we extract a short vertical segment of pixels from each generated image and stack them horizontally (bottom). The desired result is hairs moving in animation, creating a time-varying field. With StyleGAN2 the hairs mostly stick to the same coordinates, creating horizontal streaks instead.
items.capZh: 图1：“纹理粘附”示例。左：从中心潜在变量周围小邻域生成的图像的平均值（顶行）。预期结果是均匀模糊的，因为所有细节应一起移动。然而，使用StyleGAN2，许多细节（例如毛皮）粘附在相同的像素坐标上，显示出不需要的锐度。右：从潜在空间插值（顶行）中，我们从每个生成图像中提取一个短的垂直像素段，并将它们水平堆叠（底行）。期望的结果是毛发在动画中移动，产生时变场。使用StyleGAN2，毛发大多粘附在相同坐标上，产生水平条纹。

items.en: Once aliasing is adequately suppressed to force the model to implement more natural hierarchical refinement, its mode of operation changes drastically: the emergent internal representations now include coordinate systems that allow details to be correctly attached to the underlying surfaces. This promises significant improvements to models that generate video and animation. The new StyleGAN3 generator matches StyleGAN2 in terms of FID [26], while being slightly heavier computationally. Our implementation and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/NVlabs/stylegan3
items.zh: 一旦充分抑制混叠以迫使模型实现更自然的分层细化，其操作模式就会发生巨大变化：涌现的内部表示现在包括允许细节正确附着到底层表面的坐标系。这有望显著改进生成视频和动画的模型。新的StyleGAN3生成器在FID[26]方面与StyleGAN2相当，同时计算量略重。我们的实现和预训练模型可在https://github.com/NVlabs/stylegan3获取。

items.en: Several recent works have studied the lack of translation equivariance in CNNs, mainly in the context of classification [28, 35, 66, 5, 38, 69, 12, 71, 59]. We significantly expand upon the antialiasing measures in this literature and show that doing so induces a fundamentally altered image generation behavior. Group-equivariant CNNs aim to generalize the efficiency benefits of translational weight sharing to, e.g., rotation [16, 65, 63, 62] and scale [64]. Our 1×\times1 convolutions can be seen an instance of a continuously E​(2)E2\textrm{E}(2)-equivariant model [62] that remains compatible with, e.g., channel-wise ReLU nonlinearities and modulation. Dey et al. [17] apply 90∘superscript9090^{\circ} rotation-and-flip equivariant CNNs [16] to GANs and show improved data efficiency. Our work is complementary, and not motivated by efficiency. Recent implicit network [53, 56, 13] based GANs [4, 54] generate each pixel independently via similar 1×\times1 convolutions. While equivariant, these models do not help with texture sticking, as they do not use an upsampling hierarchy or implement a shallow non-antialiased one.
items.zh: 最近有几项工作研究了CNN中平移等变性的缺乏，主要是在分类的背景下[28, 35, 66, 5, 38, 69, 12, 71, 59]。我们显著扩展了这些文献中的抗混叠措施，并表明这样做会引发根本改变的图像生成行为。群等变CNN旨在将平移权重共享的效率优势推广到例如旋转[16, 65, 63, 62]和尺度[64]。我们的1×1卷积可以看作是连续E(2)等变模型[62]的一个实例，该模型与例如逐通道ReLU非线性和调制兼容。Dey等人[17]将90°旋转和翻转等变CNN[16]应用于GAN，并展示了改进的数据效率。我们的工作是互补的，并非出于效率动机。最近的隐式网络[53, 56, 13]基于GAN[4, 54]通过类似的1×1卷积独立生成每个像素。虽然等变，但这些模型无助于解决纹理粘附，因为它们不使用上采样层次结构或实现浅层非抗混叠的层次结构。

full.secZh: 2 通过连续信号解释的等变性

items.en: To begin our analysis of equivariance in CNNs, we shall first rethink our view of what exactly is the signal that flows through a network. Even though data may be stored as values in a pixel grid, we cannot naïvely hold these values to directly represent the signal. Doing so would prevent us from considering operations as trivial as translating the contents of a feature map by half a pixel.
items.zh: 为了开始分析CNN中的等变性，我们首先重新思考我们对流经网络的信号究竟是什么的看法。即使数据可能存储为像素网格中的值，我们不能天真地认为这些值直接代表信号。这样做会阻止我们考虑像将特征图内容平移半个像素这样简单的操作。

items.en: According to the Nyquist–Shannon sampling theorem [51], a regularly sampled signal can represent any continuous signal containing frequencies between zero and half of the sampling rate. Let us consider a two-dimensional, discretely sampled feature map Z​[𝒙]𝑍delimited-[]𝒙Z[\bm{x}] that consists of a regular grid of Dirac impulses of varying magnitudes, spaced 1/s1𝑠1/s units apart where s𝑠s is the sampling rate. This is analogous to an infinite two-dimensional grid of values.
items.zh: 根据Nyquist-Shannon采样定理[51]，规则采样的信号可以表示任何包含零到采样率一半之间频率的连续信号。让我们考虑一个二维离散采样特征图Z[x]，它由规则间隔1/s单位的狄拉克脉冲网格组成，其中s是采样率。这类似于一个无限的二维值网格。

items.en: Given Z​[𝒙]𝑍delimited-[]𝒙Z[\bm{x}] and s𝑠s, the Whittaker–Shannon interpolation formula [51] states that the corresponding continuous representation z​(𝒙)𝑧𝒙z(\bm{x}) is obtained by convolving the discretely sampled Dirac grid Z​[𝒙]𝑍delimited-[]𝒙Z[\bm{x}] with an ideal interpolation filter ϕssubscriptitalic-ϕ𝑠\phi_{s}, i.e., z​(𝒙)=(ϕs∗Z)​(𝒙)𝑧𝒙∗subscriptitalic-ϕ𝑠𝑍𝒙z(\bm{x})=\big{(}\phi_{s}\ast Z\big{)}(\bm{x}), where ∗∗\ast denotes continuous convolution and ϕs​(𝒙)=sinc⁡(s​x0)⋅sinc⁡(s​x1)subscriptitalic-ϕ𝑠𝒙⋅sinc𝑠subscript𝑥0sinc𝑠subscript𝑥1\phi_{s}(\bm{x})=\operatorname{sinc}(sx_{0})\cdot\operatorname{sinc}(sx_{1}) using the signal processing convention of defining sinc⁡(x)=sin⁡(π​x)/(π​x)sinc𝑥𝜋𝑥𝜋𝑥\operatorname{sinc}(x)=\sin(\pi x)/(\pi x). ϕssubscriptitalic-ϕ𝑠\phi_{s} has a bandlimit of s/2𝑠2s/2 along the horizontal and vertical dimensions, ensuring that the resulting continuous signal captures all frequencies that can be represented with sampling rate s𝑠s.
items.zh: 给定Z[x]和s，Whittaker-Shannon插值公式[51]指出，相应的连续表示z(x)是通过将离散采样的狄拉克网格Z[x]与理想插值滤波器φs卷积得到的，即z(x) = (φs * Z)(x)，其中*表示连续卷积，φs(x) = sinc(s x0)·sinc(s x1)，使用信号处理惯例定义sinc(x) = sin(πx)/(πx)。φs在水平和垂直方向上的带限为s/2，确保得到的连续信号捕获所有可以用采样率s表示的频率。

items.en: Conversion from the continuous to the discrete domain corresponds to sampling the continuous signal z​(𝒙)𝑧𝒙z(\bm{x}) at the sampling points of Z​[𝒙]𝑍delimited-[]𝒙Z[\bm{x}] that we define to be offset by half the sample spacing to lie at the “pixel centers”, see Figure 2, left. This can be expressed as a pointwise multiplication with a two-dimensional Dirac comb (𝒙)s=∑X∈ℤ2δ(𝒙−(X+12)/s){}_{s\!\!\!\>\>}(\bm{x})=\sum_{X\!\in\mathbb{Z}^{2}}\delta\big{(}\bm{x}-(X+\frac{1}{2})/s\big{)}.
items.zh: 从连续域到离散域的转换对应于在Z[x]的采样点处对连续信号z(x)进行采样，我们定义这些采样点偏移半个采样间距，位于“像素中心”，见图2左。这可以表示为与二维狄拉克梳的点乘。

items.en: We earmark the unit square 𝒙∈[0,1]2𝒙superscript012\bm{x}\in[0,1]^{2} in z​(𝒙)𝑧𝒙z(\bm{x}) as our canvas for the signal of interest. In Z​[𝒙]𝑍delimited-[]𝒙Z[\bm{x}] there are s2superscript𝑠2s^{2} discrete samples in this region, but the above convolution with ϕssubscriptitalic-ϕ𝑠\phi_{s} means that values of Z​[𝒙]𝑍delimited-[]𝒙Z[\bm{x}] outside the unit square also influence z​(𝒙)𝑧𝒙z(\bm{x}) inside it. Thus storing an s×s𝑠𝑠s\times s -pixel feature map is not sufficient; in theory, we would need to store the entire infinite Z​[𝒙]𝑍delimited-[]𝒙Z[\bm{x}]. As a practical solution, we store Z​[𝒙]𝑍delimited-[]𝒙Z[\bm{x}] as a two-dimensional array that covers a region slightly larger than the unit square (Section 3.2).
items.zh: 我们将z(x)中的单位正方形x∈[0,1]^2指定为我们感兴趣信号的画布。在Z[x]中，该区域有s^2个离散样本，但与φs的上述卷积意味着单位正方形外的Z[x]值也会影响内部的z(x)。因此，存储s×s像素的特征图是不够的；理论上，我们需要存储整个无限的Z[x]。作为实际解决方案，我们将Z[x]存储为一个覆盖略大于单位正方形区域的二维数组（第3.2节）。

items.en: Having established correspondence between bandlimited, continuous feature maps z​(𝒙)𝑧𝒙z(\bm{x}) and discretely sampled feature maps Z​[𝒙]𝑍delimited-[]𝒙Z[\bm{x}], we can shift our focus away from the usual pixel-centric view of the signal. In the remainder of this paper, we shall interpret z​(𝒙)𝑧𝒙z(\bm{x}) as being the actual signal being operated on, and the discretely sampled feature map Z​[𝒙]𝑍delimited-[]𝒙Z[\bm{x}] as merely a convenient encoding for it.
items.zh: 在建立了带限连续特征图z(x)与离散采样特征图Z[x]之间的对应关系后，我们可以将焦点从通常以像素为中心的信号视图转移开。在本文的其余部分，我们将把z(x)解释为实际被操作的信号，而离散采样的特征图Z[x]仅仅是其方便的编码。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Left: Discrete representation Z𝑍Z and continuous representation z𝑧z are related to each other via convolution with ideal interpolation filter ϕssubscriptitalic-ϕ𝑠\phi_{s} and pointwise multiplication with Dirac comb s𝑠{}_{s\!\!\!\>\>}. Right: Nonlinearity σ𝜎\sigma, ReLU in this example, may produce arbitrarily high frequencies in the continuous-domain σ​(z)𝜎𝑧\sigma(z). Low-pass filtering via ϕssubscriptitalic-ϕ𝑠\phi_{s} is necessary to ensure that Z′superscript𝑍′Z^{\prime} captures the result.
items.capZh: 图2：左：离散表示Z和连续表示z通过理想插值滤波器φs的卷积和狄拉克梳的点乘相互关联。右：非线性σ（本例中为ReLU）可能在连续域σ(z)中产生任意高的频率。通过φs进行低通滤波对于确保Z'捕获结果是必要的。

items.en: Practical neural networks operate on the discretely sampled feature maps. Consider operation 𝐅𝐅\mathbf{F} (convolution, nonlinearity, etc.) operating on a discrete feature map: Z′=𝐅​(Z)superscript𝑍′𝐅𝑍Z^{\prime}=\mathbf{F}(Z). The feature map has a corresponding continuous counterpart, so we also have a corresponding mapping in the continuous domain: z′=𝐟​(z)superscript𝑧′𝐟𝑧z^{\prime}=\mathbf{f}(z). Now, an operation specified in one domain can be seen to perform a corresponding operation in the other domain:
items.zh: 实际的神经网络操作在离散采样的特征图上。考虑操作F（卷积、非线性等）作用于离散特征图：Z' = F(Z)。特征图有对应的连续对应物，因此连续域中也有对应的映射：z' = f(z)。现在，在一个域中指定的操作可以看作在另一个域中执行相应的操作：

items.en: where ⊙direct-product\odot denotes pointwise multiplication and s𝑠s and s′superscript𝑠′s^{\prime} are the input and output sampling rates. Note that in the latter case 𝐟𝐟\mathbf{f} must not introduce frequency content beyond the output bandlimit s′/2superscript𝑠′2s^{\prime}/2.
items.zh: 其中⊙表示点乘，s和s'是输入和输出采样率。注意，在后一种情况下，f不得引入超出输出带限s'/2的频率内容。

items.en: Operation 𝐟𝐟\mathbf{f} is equivariant with respect to a spatial transformation 𝐭𝐭\mathbf{t} of the 2D plane if it commutes with it in the continuous domain: 𝐭∘𝐟=𝐟∘𝐭𝐭𝐟𝐟𝐭\mathbf{t}\circ\mathbf{f}=\mathbf{f}\circ\mathbf{t}. We note that when inputs are bandlimited to s/2𝑠2s/2, an equivariant operation must not generate frequency content above the output bandlimit of s′/2superscript𝑠′2s^{\prime}/2, as otherwise no faithful discrete output representation exists.
items.zh: 如果操作f在连续域中与二维平面的空间变换t交换，即t∘f = f∘t，则f关于t是等变的。我们注意到，当输入带限于s/2时，等变操作不得生成超出输出带限s'/2的频率内容，否则不存在忠实的离散输出表示。

items.en: We focus on two types of equivariance in this paper: translation and rotation. In the case of rotation the spectral constraint is somewhat stricter — rotating an image corresponds to rotating the spectrum, and in order to guarantee the bandlimit in both horizontal and vertical direction, the spectrum must be limited to a disc with radius s/2𝑠2s/2. This applies to both the initial network input as well as the bandlimiting filters used for downsampling, as will be described later.
items.zh: 本文中我们关注两种类型的等变性：平移和旋转。在旋转的情况下，频谱约束稍严格——旋转图像对应于旋转频谱，并且为了保证水平和垂直方向上的带限，频谱必须限制在半径为s/2的圆盘内。这适用于初始网络输入以及用于下采样的带限滤波器，稍后将描述。

items.en: We now consider the primitive operations in a typical generator network: convolution, upsampling, downsampling, and nonlinearity. Without loss of generality, we discuss the operations acting on a single feature map: pointwise linear combination of features has no effect on the analysis.
items.zh: 我们现在考虑典型生成器网络中的基本操作：卷积、上采样、下采样和非线性。不失一般性，我们讨论作用于单个特征图的操作：特征的逐点线性组合对分析没有影响。

items.en: Consider a standard convolution with a discrete kernel K𝐾K. We can interpret K𝐾K as living in the same grid as the input feature map, with sampling rate s𝑠s. The discrete-domain operation is simply 𝐅conv​(Z)=K∗Zsubscript𝐅conv𝑍∗𝐾𝑍\mathbf{F}_{\!\!\>\text{conv}}(Z)=K\ast Z, and we obtain the corresponding continuous operation from Eq. 1:
items.zh: 考虑一个具有离散核 K 的标准卷积。我们可以将 K 解释为与输入特征图位于同一网格中，采样率为 s。离散域操作就是 F_conv(Z) = K * Z，并且我们从公式 1 得到相应的连续操作：

items.en: due to commutativity of convolution and the fact that discretization followed by convolution with ideal low-pass filter, both with same sampling rate s𝑠s, is an identity operation, i.e., ϕs∗(⊙sz)=z\phi_{s}\ast({}_{s\!\!\!\>\>}\odot z)=z. In other words, the convolution operates by continuously sliding the discretized kernel over the continuous representation of the feature map. This convolution introduces no new frequencies, so the bandlimit requirements for both translation and rotation equivariance are trivially fulfilled.
items.zh: 由于卷积的交换性以及离散化后与理想低通滤波器卷积（两者具有相同采样率 s）是恒等操作，即 φ_s * (⊙_s z) = z。换句话说，卷积通过将离散核在特征图的连续表示上连续滑动来操作。这种卷积不引入新频率，因此平移和旋转等变性的带限要求自然满足。

items.en: Convolution also commutes with translation in the continuous domain, and thus the operation is equivariant to translation. For rotation equivariance, the discrete kernel K𝐾K needs to be radially symmetric. We later show in Section 3.2 that trivially symmetric 1×\times1 convolution kernels are, despite their simplicity, a viable choice for rotation equivariant generative networks.
items.zh: 卷积在连续域中也与平移交换，因此该操作对平移是等变的。对于旋转等变性，离散核 K 需要是径向对称的。我们稍后在 3.2 节中展示，平凡对称的 1×1 卷积核尽管简单，却是旋转等变生成网络的可行选择。

items.en: Ideal upsampling does not modify the continuous representation. Its only purpose is to increase the output sampling rate (s′>ssuperscript𝑠′𝑠s^{\prime}>s) to add headroom in the spectrum where subsequent layers may introduce additional content. Translation and rotation equivariance follow directly from upsampling being an identity operation in the continuous domain. With 𝐟up​(z)=zsubscript𝐟up𝑧𝑧\mathbf{f}_{\!\>\text{up}}(z)=z, the discrete operation according to Eq. 1 is 𝐅up(Z)=⊙s′(ϕs∗Z)\mathbf{F}_{\!\!\>\text{up}}(Z)={}_{s^{\prime}\!\!\>}\odot(\phi_{s}\ast Z). If we choose s′=n​ssuperscript𝑠′𝑛𝑠s^{\prime}=ns with integer n𝑛n, this operation can be implemented by first interleaving Z𝑍Z with zeros to increase its sampling rate and then convolving it with a discretized filter ⊙s′ϕs{}_{s^{\prime}\!\!\>}\odot\phi_{s}.
items.zh: 理想上采样不修改连续表示。其唯一目的是增加输出采样率 (s' > s)，以便在频谱中为后续层可能引入的新内容留出空间。平移和旋转等变性直接源于上采样在连续域中是恒等操作。对于 f_up(z) = z，根据公式 1 的离散操作是 F_up(Z) = ⊙_{s'} (φ_s * Z)。如果我们选择 s' = n s，其中 n 为整数，则此操作可以通过先将 Z 与零交错以增加其采样率，然后与离散滤波器 ⊙_{s'} φ_s 卷积来实现。

items.en: In downsampling, we must low-pass filter z𝑧z to remove frequencies above the output bandlimit, so that the signal can be represented faithfully in the coarser discretization. The operation in continuous domain is 𝐟down​(z)=ψs′∗zsubscript𝐟down𝑧∗subscript𝜓superscript𝑠′𝑧\mathbf{f}_{\!\>\text{down}}(z)=\psi_{s^{\prime}}\ast z, where an ideal low-pass filter ψs:=s2⋅ϕsassignsubscript𝜓𝑠⋅superscript𝑠2subscriptitalic-ϕ𝑠\psi_{s}:={s}^{2}\cdot\phi_{s} is simply the corresponding interpolation filter normalized to unit mass. The discrete counterpart is 𝐅down(Z)=⊙s′(ψs′∗(ϕs∗Z))=1/s2⋅⊙s′(ψs′∗ψs∗Z)=(s′/s)2⋅⊙s′(ϕs′∗Z)\mathbf{F}_{\!\!\>\text{down}}(Z)={}_{s^{\prime}\!\!\>}\odot\big{(}\psi_{s^{\prime}}\ast(\phi_{s}\ast Z)\big{)}=1/s^{2}\cdot{}_{s^{\prime}\!\!\>}\odot(\psi_{s^{\prime}}\ast\psi_{s}\ast Z)=(s^{\prime}/s)^{2}\cdot{}_{s^{\prime}\!\!\>}\odot(\phi_{s^{\prime}}\ast Z). The latter equality follows from ψs∗ψs′=ψmin​(s,s′)∗subscript𝜓𝑠subscript𝜓superscript𝑠′subscript𝜓min𝑠superscript𝑠′\psi_{s}\ast\psi_{s^{\prime}}=\psi_{\text{min}(s,s^{\prime})}. Similar to upsampling, downsampling by an integer fraction can be implemented with a discrete convolution followed by dropping sample points. Translation equivariance follows automatically from the commutativity of 𝐟down​(z)subscript𝐟down𝑧\mathbf{f}_{\!\>\text{down}}(z) with translation, but for rotation equivariance we must replace ϕs′subscriptitalic-ϕsuperscript𝑠′\phi_{s^{\prime}} with a radially symmetric filter with disc-shaped frequency response. The ideal such filter [9] is given by ϕs∘​(𝒙)=jinc⁡(s​∥𝒙∥)=2​J1​(π​s​∥𝒙∥)/(π​s​∥𝒙∥)superscriptsubscriptitalic-ϕ𝑠𝒙jinc𝑠delimited-∥∥𝒙2subscript𝐽1𝜋𝑠delimited-∥∥𝒙𝜋𝑠delimited-∥∥𝒙\phi_{s}^{\circ}(\bm{x})=\operatorname{jinc}(s\lVert\bm{x}\rVert)=2J_{1}(\pi s\lVert\bm{x}\rVert)/(\pi s\lVert\bm{x}\rVert), where J1subscript𝐽1J_{1} is the first order Bessel function of the first kind.
items.zh: 在下采样中，我们必须对 z 进行低通滤波以移除高于输出带限的频率，以便信号可以在更粗糙的离散化中忠实地表示。连续域中的操作是 f_down(z) = ψ_{s'} * z，其中理想低通滤波器 ψ_s := s^2 · φ_s 只是相应归一化到单位质量的插值滤波器。离散对应是 F_down(Z) = ⊙_{s'} (ψ_{s'} * (φ_s * Z)) = 1/s^2 · ⊙_{s'} (ψ_{s'} * ψ_s * Z) = (s'/s)^2 · ⊙_{s'} (φ_{s'} * Z)。后一个等式源于 ψ_s * ψ_{s'} = ψ_{min(s,s')}。与上采样类似，整数倍下采样可以通过离散卷积后跟丢弃采样点来实现。平移等变性自动源于 f_down(z) 与平移的交换性，但对于旋转等变性，我们必须将 φ_{s'} 替换为具有圆盘形频率响应的径向对称滤波器。理想的此类滤波器 [9] 由 φ_s^∘(x) = jinc(s∥x∥) = 2J_1(π s∥x∥)/(π s∥x∥) 给出，其中 J_1 是第一类一阶贝塞尔函数。

items.en: Applying a pointwise nonlinearity σ𝜎\sigma in the discrete domain does not commute with fractional translation or rotation. However, in the continuous domain, any pointwise function commutes trivially with geometric transformations and is thus equivariant to translation and rotation. Fulfilling the bandlimit constraint is another question — applying, e.g., ReLU in the continuous domain may introduce arbitrarily high frequencies that cannot be represented in the output.
items.zh: 在离散域中应用逐点非线性 σ 不与分数平移或旋转交换。然而，在连续域中，任何逐点函数都平凡地与几何变换交换，因此对平移和旋转是等变的。满足带限约束是另一个问题——例如，在连续域中应用 ReLU 可能会引入无法在输出中表示的任意高频。

items.en: A natural solution is to eliminate the offending high-frequency content by convolving the continuous result with the ideal low-pass filter ψssubscript𝜓𝑠\psi_{s}. Then, the continuous representation of the nonlinearity becomes 𝐟σ​(z)=ψs∗σ​(z)=s2⋅ϕs∗σ​(z)subscript𝐟𝜎𝑧∗subscript𝜓𝑠𝜎𝑧∗⋅superscript𝑠2subscriptitalic-ϕ𝑠𝜎𝑧\mathbf{f}_{\!\>\mathrm{\sigma}}(z)=\psi_{s}\ast\sigma(z)=s^{2}\cdot\phi_{s}\ast\sigma(z) and the discrete counterpart is 𝐅σ(Z)=s2⋅⊙s(ϕs∗σ(ϕs∗Z))\mathbf{F}_{\!\!\>\mathrm{\sigma}}(Z)=s^{2}\cdot{}_{s\!\!\!\>\>}\odot(\phi_{s}\ast\sigma(\phi_{s}\ast Z)) (see Figure 2, right). This discrete operation cannot be realized without temporarily entering the continuous representation. We approximate this by upsampling the signal, applying the nonlinearity in the higher resolution, and downsampling it afterwards. Even though the nonlinearity is still performed in the discrete domain, we have found that only a 2×\times temporary resolution increase is sufficient for high-quality equivariance. For rotation equivariance, we must use the radially symmetric interpolation filter ϕs∘superscriptsubscriptitalic-ϕ𝑠\phi_{s}^{\circ} in the downsampling step, as discussed above.
items.zh: 一个自然的解决方案是通过将连续结果与理想低通滤波器 ψ_s 卷积来消除有害的高频内容。然后，非线性的连续表示变为 f_σ(z) = ψ_s * σ(z) = s^2 · φ_s * σ(z)，离散对应是 F_σ(Z) = s^2 · ⊙_s (φ_s * σ(φ_s * Z))（见图 2 右）。此离散操作无法在不暂时进入连续表示的情况下实现。我们通过上采样信号、在更高分辨率下应用非线性、然后下采样来近似。尽管非线性仍在离散域中执行，但我们发现仅 2 倍的临时分辨率增加就足以实现高质量等变性。对于旋转等变性，我们必须在下采样步骤中使用径向对称插值滤波器 φ_s^∘，如上所述。

items.en: Note that nonlinearity is the only operation capable of generating novel frequencies in our formulation, and that we can limit the range of these novel frequencies by applying a reconstruction filter with a lower cutoff than s/2𝑠2s/2 before the final discretization operation. This gives us precise control over how much new information is introduced by each layer of a generator network (Section 3.2).
items.zh: 注意，非线性是我们公式中唯一能够生成新频率的操作，并且我们可以通过在最终离散化操作之前应用截止频率低于 s/2 的重建滤波器来限制这些新频率的范围。这使我们能够精确控制生成网络每一层引入多少新信息（第 3.2 节）。

full.secZh: 3 在生成网络中的实际应用

items.en: We will now apply the theoretical ideas from the previous section in practice, by converting the well-established StyleGAN2 [34] generator to be fully equivariant to translation and rotation. We will introduce the necessary changes step-by-step, evaluating their impact in Figure 3. The discriminator remains unchanged in our experiments.
items.zh: 我们现在将上一节的理论思想付诸实践，将成熟的 StyleGAN2 [34] 生成器转换为完全对平移和旋转等变。我们将逐步介绍必要的更改，并在图 3 中评估其影响。在我们的实验中，判别器保持不变。

items.en: The StyleGAN2 generator consists of two parts. First, a mapping network transforms an initial, normally distributed latent to an intermediate latent code 𝐰∼𝒲similar-to𝐰𝒲{\bf w}\sim\mathcal{W}. Then, a synthesis network 𝐆𝐆\mathbf{G} starts from a learned 4×\times4×\times512 constant Z0subscript𝑍0Z_{0} and applies a sequence of N𝑁N layers — consisting of convolutions, nonlinearities, upsampling, and per-pixel noise — to produce an output image ZN=𝐆​(Z0;𝐰)subscript𝑍𝑁𝐆subscript𝑍0𝐰Z_{N}=\mathbf{G}(Z_{0};{\bf w}). The intermediate latent code 𝐰𝐰{\bf w} controls the modulation of the convolution kernels in 𝐆𝐆\mathbf{G}. The layers follow a rigid 2×\times upsampling schedule, where two layers are executed at each resolution and the number of feature maps is halved after each upsampling. Additionally, StyleGAN2 employs skip connections, mixing regularization [33], and path length regularization.
items.zh: StyleGAN2 生成器由两部分组成。首先，一个映射网络将初始正态分布的潜在码转换为中间潜在码 w ~ W。然后，合成网络 G 从学习到的 4×4×512 常数 Z_0 开始，应用 N 层序列——包括卷积、非线性、上采样和逐像素噪声——以生成输出图像 Z_N = G(Z_0; w)。中间潜在码 w 控制 G 中卷积核的调制。这些层遵循严格的 2 倍上采样计划，在每个分辨率下执行两层，并且每次上采样后特征图数量减半。此外，StyleGAN2 使用跳跃连接、混合正则化 [33] 和路径长度正则化。

items.en: Our goal is to make every layer of 𝐆𝐆\mathbf{G} equivariant w.r.t. the continuous signal, so that all finer details transform together with the coarser features of a local neighborhood. If this succeeds, the entire network becomes similarly equivariant. In other words, we aim to make the continuous operation 𝐠𝐠\mathbf{g} of the synthesis network equivariant w.r.t. transformations 𝐭𝐭\mathbf{t} (translations and rotations) applied on the continuous input z0subscript𝑧0z_{0}: 𝐠​(𝐭​[z0];𝐰)=𝐭​[𝐠​(z0;𝐰)]𝐠𝐭delimited-[]subscript𝑧0𝐰𝐭delimited-[]𝐠subscript𝑧0𝐰\mathbf{g}(\mathbf{t}[z_{0}];{\bf w})=\mathbf{t}[\mathbf{g}(z_{0};{\bf w})]. To evaluate the impact of various architectural changes and practical approximations, we need a way to measure how well the network implements the equivariances. For translation equivariance, we report the peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) in decibels (dB) between two sets of images, obtained by translating the input and output of the synthesis network by a random amount, resembling the definition by Zhang [69]:
items.zh: 我们的目标是使 G 的每一层相对于连续信号是等变的，以便所有更精细的细节与局部邻域的粗糙特征一起变换。如果成功，整个网络将变得类似等变。换句话说，我们旨在使合成网络的连续操作 g 相对于应用于连续输入 z_0 的变换 t（平移和旋转）是等变的：g(t[z_0]; w) = t[g(z_0; w)]。为了评估各种架构变化和实际近似的影响，我们需要一种方法来衡量网络实现等变性的程度。对于平移等变性，我们报告两组图像之间的峰值信噪比（PSNR，以分贝 dB 为单位），这两组图像通过对合成网络的输入和输出进行随机平移得到，类似于 Zhang [69] 的定义：

items.en: Each pair of images, corresponding to a different random choice of 𝐰𝐰{\bf w}, is sampled at integer pixel locations p𝑝p within their mutually valid region 𝒱𝒱\mathcal{V}. Color channels c𝑐c are processed independently, and the intended dynamic range of generated images −1​…+11…1-1\ldots{+}1 gives I𝑚𝑎𝑥=2subscript𝐼𝑚𝑎𝑥2I_{\mathit{max}}=2. Operator 𝐭xsubscript𝐭𝑥\mathbf{t}_{x} implements spatial translation with 2D offset x𝑥x, here drawn from distribution 𝒳2superscript𝒳2\mathcal{X}^{2} of integer offsets. We define an analogous metric EQ-R for rotations, with the rotation angles drawn from 𝒰​(0∘,360∘)𝒰superscript0superscript360\mathcal{U}(0^{\circ},360^{\circ}). Appendix E gives implementation details and our accompanying videos highlight the practical relevance of different dB values.
items.zh: 每对图像对应不同的随机选择 w，在它们共同有效区域 V 内的整数像素位置 p 处采样。颜色通道 c 独立处理，生成图像的预期动态范围 -1…+1 给出 I_max = 2。算子 t_x 实现具有二维偏移 x 的空间平移，此处从整数偏移的分布 X^2 中抽取。我们为旋转定义了一个类似的度量 EQ-R，旋转角度从 U(0°, 360°) 中抽取。附录 E 给出了实现细节，我们的随附视频突出了不同 dB 值的实际相关性。

full.sec: 3.1 Fourier features and baseline simplifications (configs b–d)
full.secZh: 3.1 傅里叶特征与基线简化（配置b–d）

items.en: To facilitate exact continuous translation and rotation of the input z0subscript𝑧0z_{0}, we replace the learned input constant in StyleGAN2 with Fourier features [56, 66], which also has the advantage of naturally defining a spatially infinite map. We sample the frequencies uniformly within the circular frequency band fc=2subscript𝑓𝑐2f_{c}=2, matching the original 4×\times4 input resolution, and keep them fixed over the course of training. This change (configs a and b in Figure 3, left) slightly improves FID and, crucially, allows us to compute the equivariance metrics without having to approximate the operator 𝐭𝐭\mathbf{t}. This baseline architecture is far from being equivariant; our accompanying videos show that the output images deteriorate drastically when the input features are translated or rotated from their original position.
items.zh: 为了便于对输入 z_0 进行精确的连续平移和旋转，我们将 StyleGAN2 中学习到的输入常数替换为傅里叶特征 [56, 66]，这还具有自然定义空间无限图的优点。我们在圆形频带 f_c = 2 内均匀采样频率，匹配原始的 4×4 输入分辨率，并在训练过程中保持固定。此更改（图 3 左中的配置 a 和 b）略微改善了 FID，并且关键的是，允许我们计算等变性度量而无需近似算子 t。此基线架构远非等变；我们的随附视频显示，当输入特征从其原始位置平移或旋转时，输出图像急剧恶化。

items.en: Next, we remove the per-pixel noise inputs because they are strongly at odds with our goal of a natural transformation hierarchy, i.e., that the exact sub-pixel position of each feature is exclusively inherited from the underlying coarse features. While this change (config c) is approximately FID-neutral, it fails to improve the equivariance metrics when considered in isolation.
items.zh: 接下来，我们移除逐像素噪声输入，因为它们与我们自然变换层次结构的目标强烈冲突，即每个特征的精确亚像素位置仅从底层粗糙特征继承。虽然此更改（配置 c）大致对 FID 中性，但单独考虑时未能改善等变性度量。

items.en: To further simplify the setup, we decrease the mapping network depth as recommended by Karras et al. [32] and disable mixing regularization and path length regularization [34]. Finally, we also eliminate the output skip connections. We hypothesize that their benefit is mostly related to gradient magnitude dynamics during training and address the underlying issue more directly using a simple normalization before each convolution. We track the exponential moving average σ2=𝔼​[x2]superscript𝜎2𝔼delimited-[]superscript𝑥2\sigma^{2}=\mathbb{E}[x^{2}] over all pixels and feature maps during training, and divide the feature maps by σ2superscript𝜎2\sqrt{\sigma^{2}}. In practice, we bake the division into the convolution weights to improve efficiency. These changes (config d) bring FID back to the level of original StyleGAN2, while leading to a slight improvement in translation equivariance.
items.zh: 为了进一步简化设置，我们按照 Karras 等人 [32] 的建议减少映射网络深度，并禁用混合正则化和路径长度正则化 [34]。最后，我们还消除了输出跳跃连接。我们假设它们的好处主要与训练期间的梯度幅度动态有关，并使用每次卷积前的简单归一化更直接地解决根本问题。我们在训练期间跟踪所有像素和特征图的指数移动平均 σ^2 = E[x^2]，并将特征图除以 sqrt(σ^2)。在实践中，我们将除法融入卷积权重以提高效率。这些更改（配置 d）将 FID 带回原始 StyleGAN2 的水平，同时导致平移等变性略有改善。

items.capEn: Figure 4: (a) 1D example of a 2×\times upsampling filter with n=6𝑛6n=6, s=2𝑠2s=2, fc=1subscript𝑓𝑐1f_{c}=1, and fh=0.4subscript𝑓ℎ0.4f_{h}=0.4 (blue). Setting fh=0.6subscript𝑓ℎ0.6f_{h}=0.6 makes the transition band wider (green), which reduces the unwanted stopband ripple and thus leads to stronger attenuation. (b) Our alias-free generator, corresponding to configs t and r in Figure 3. The main datapath consists of Fourier features and normalization (Section 3.1), modulated convolutions [34], and filtered nonlinearities (Section 3.2). (c) Flexible layer specifications (config t) with N=14𝑁14N=14 and sN=1024subscript𝑠𝑁1024s_{N}=1024. Cutoff fcsubscript𝑓𝑐f_{c} (blue) and minimum acceptable stopband frequency ftsubscript𝑓𝑡f_{t} (orange) obey geometric progression over the layers; sampling rate s𝑠s (red) and actual stopband fc+fhsubscript𝑓𝑐subscript𝑓ℎf_{c}+f_{h} (green) are computed according to our design constraints.
items.capZh: 图 4：(a) 2 倍上采样滤波器的 1D 示例，n=6，s=2，f_c=1，f_h=0.4（蓝色）。设置 f_h=0.6 使过渡带更宽（绿色），这减少了不需要的阻带波纹，从而带来更强的衰减。(b) 我们的无混叠生成器，对应于图 3 中的配置 t 和 r。主数据路径包括傅里叶特征和归一化（第 3.1 节）、调制卷积 [34] 和滤波非线性（第 3.2 节）。(c) 灵活层规范（配置 t），N=14，s_N=1024。截止频率 f_c（蓝色）和最小可接受阻带频率 f_t（橙色）在层上遵循几何级数；采样率 s（红色）和实际阻带 f_c+f_h（绿色）根据我们的设计约束计算。

full.sec: 3.2 Step-by-step redesign motivated by continuous interpretation
full.secZh: 3.2 由连续解释驱动的逐步重新设计

items.en: Our theory assumes an infinite spatial extent for the feature maps, which we approximate by maintaining a fixed-size margin around the target canvas, cropping to this extended canvas after each layer. This explicit extension is necessary as border padding is known to leak absolute image coordinates into the internal representations [28, 35, 66]. In practice, we have found a 101010-pixel margin to be enough; further increase has no noticeable effect on the results.
items.zh: 我们的理论假设特征图具有无限空间范围，我们通过在目标画布周围保持固定大小的边距来近似，在每层之后裁剪到扩展后的画布。这种显式扩展是必要的，因为边界填充已知会将绝对图像坐标泄露到内部表示中 [28, 35, 66]。在实践中，我们发现 10 像素边距就足够了；进一步增加对结果没有明显影响。

items.en: Motivated by our theoretical model, we replace the bilinear 2×\times upsampling filter with a better approximation of the ideal low-pass filter. We use a windowed sincsinc\operatorname{sinc} filter with a relatively large Kaiser window [41] of size n=6𝑛6n=6, meaning that each output pixel is affected by 6 input pixels in upsampling and each input pixel affects 6 output pixels in downsampling. Kaiser window is a particularly good choice for our purposes, because it offers explicit control over the transition band and attenuation (Figure 4a). In the remainder of this section, we specify the transition band explicitly and compute the remaining parameters using Kaiser’s original formulas (Appendix C). For now, we choose to employ critical sampling and set the filter cutoff fc=s/2subscript𝑓𝑐𝑠2f_{c}=s/2, i.e., exactly at the bandlimit, and transition band half-width fh=(2−1)​(s/2)subscript𝑓ℎ21𝑠2f_{h}=(\raisebox{0.0pt}[0.0pt][0.0pt]{$\sqrt{2}$}-1)(s/2). Recall that sampling rate s𝑠s equals the width of the canvas in pixels, given our definitions in Section 2.
items.zh: 受我们理论模型的启发，我们将双线性 2 倍上采样滤波器替换为理想低通滤波器的更好近似。我们使用窗口化 sinc 滤波器，具有相对较大的 Kaiser 窗口 [41]，大小为 n=6，这意味着每个输出像素在上采样中受 6 个输入像素影响，每个输入像素在下采样中影响 6 个输出像素。Kaiser 窗口对我们的目的来说是一个特别好的选择，因为它提供了对过渡带和衰减的显式控制（图 4a）。在本节的其余部分，我们显式指定过渡带，并使用 Kaiser 的原始公式（附录 C）计算剩余参数。目前，我们选择采用临界采样，并将滤波器截止频率设置为 f_c = s/2，即正好在带限处，过渡带半宽度 f_h = (√2 - 1)(s/2)。回想一下，根据我们在第 2 节中的定义，采样率 s 等于画布宽度（以像素为单位）。

items.en: The improved handling of boundaries and upsampling (config e) leads to better translation equivariance. However, FID is compromised by 16%, probably because we started to constrain what the feature maps can contain. In a further ablation (Figure 3, right), smaller resampling filters (n=4𝑛4n=4) hurt translation equivariance, while larger filters (n=8𝑛8n=8) mainly increase training time.
items.zh: 改进的边界处理和上采样（配置 e）带来了更好的平移等变性。然而，FID 降低了 16%，可能是因为我们开始约束特征图可以包含的内容。在进一步的消融实验（图 3 右）中，较小的重采样滤波器 (n=4) 损害了平移等变性，而较大的滤波器 (n=8) 主要增加了训练时间。

items.en: Our theoretical treatment of nonlinearities calls for wrapping each leaky ReLU (or any other commonly used non-linearity) between m×m\times upsampling and m×m\times downsampling, for some magnification factor m𝑚m. We further note that the order of upsampling and convolution can be switched by virtue of the signal being bandlimited, allowing us to fuse the regular 2×\times upsampling and a subsequent m×m\times upsampling related to the nonlinearity into a single 2m×2m\times upsampling. In practice, we find m=2𝑚2m=2 to be sufficient (Figure 3, right), again improving EQ-T (config f). Implementing the upsample-LReLU-downsample sequence is not efficient using the primitives available in current deep learning frameworks [1, 45], and thus we implement a custom CUDA kernel (Appendix D) that combines these operations (Figure 4b), leading to 10×\times faster training and considerable memory savings.
items.zh: 我们对非线性的理论处理要求将每个 leaky ReLU（或任何其他常用非线性）包裹在 m 倍上采样和 m 倍下采样之间，其中 m 是放大因子。我们进一步注意到，由于信号是带限的，上采样和卷积的顺序可以交换，允许我们将常规的 2 倍上采样和后续与非线性相关的 m 倍上采样融合为单个 2m 倍上采样。在实践中，我们发现 m=2 就足够了（图 3 右），再次改善了 EQ-T（配置 f）。使用当前深度学习框架 [1, 45] 中可用的原语实现上采样-LReLU-下采样序列效率不高，因此我们实现了一个自定义 CUDA 内核（附录 D），将这些操作组合在一起（图 4b），导致训练速度提高 10 倍并显著节省内存。

items.en: The critical sampling scheme — where filter cutoff is set exactly at the bandlimit — is ideal for many image processing applications as it strikes a good balance between antialiasing and the retention of high-frequency detail [58]. However, our goals are markedly different because aliasing is highly detrimental for the equivariance of the generator. While high-frequency detail is important in the output image and thus in the highest-resolution layers, it is less important in the earlier ones given that their exact resolutions are somewhat arbitrary to begin with.
items.zh: 临界采样方案——即滤波器截止频率精确设置在频带极限处——对于许多图像处理应用来说是理想的，因为它在抗混叠和保留高频细节之间取得了良好的平衡[58]。然而，我们的目标截然不同，因为混叠对生成器的等变性非常有害。虽然高频细节在输出图像中很重要，因此在最高分辨率层中很重要，但在较早的层中则不那么重要，因为它们的精确分辨率一开始就有些随意。

items.en: To suppress aliasing, we can simply lower the cutoff frequency to fc=s/2−fhsubscript𝑓𝑐𝑠2subscript𝑓ℎf_{c}=s/2-f_{h}, which ensures that all alias frequencies (above s/2𝑠2s/2) are in the stopband.222Here, fcsubscript𝑓𝑐f_{c} and fhsubscript𝑓ℎf_{h} correspond to the output (downsampling) filter of each layer. The input (upsampling) filters are based on the properties of the incoming signal, i.e., the output filter parameters of the previous layer. For example, lowering the cutoff of the blue filter in Figure 4a would move its frequency response left so that the the worst-case attenuation of alias frequencies improves from 666 dB to 404040 dB. This oversampling can be seen as a computational cost of better antialiasing, as we now use the same number of samples to express a slower-varying signal than before. In practice, we choose to lower fcsubscript𝑓𝑐f_{c} on all layers except the highest-resolution ones, because in the end the generator must be able to produce crisp images to match the training data. As the signals now contain less spatial information, we modify the heuristic used for determining the number of feature maps to be inversely proportional to fcsubscript𝑓𝑐f_{c} instead of the sampling rate s𝑠s. These changes (config g) further improve translation equivariance and push FID below the original StyleGAN2.
items.zh: 为了抑制混叠，我们可以简单地将截止频率降低到 fc=s/2−fh，这确保所有混叠频率（高于 s/2）都在阻带中。222这里，fc 和 fh 对应于每层的输出（下采样）滤波器。输入（上采样）滤波器基于输入信号的特性，即前一层的输出滤波器参数。例如，降低图 4a 中蓝色滤波器的截止频率会将其频率响应向左移动，使得混叠频率的最坏情况衰减从 6 dB 提高到 40 dB。这种过采样可以看作是更好抗混叠的计算成本，因为我们现在使用相同数量的样本来表达比以前变化更慢的信号。在实践中，我们选择在所有层（最高分辨率层除外）上降低 fc，因为最终生成器必须能够生成清晰的图像以匹配训练数据。由于信号现在包含更少的空间信息，我们修改了用于确定特征图数量的启发式方法，使其与 fc 成反比，而不是与采样率 s 成反比。这些更改（配置 g）进一步提高了平移等变性，并将 FID 降低到原始 StyleGAN2 以下。

items.en: Equivariant generator layers are well suited for modeling unaligned and arbitrarily oriented datasets, because any geometric transformation introduced to the intermediate features zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i} will directly carry over to the final image zNsubscript𝑧𝑁z_{N}. Due to the limited capability of the layers themselves to introduce global transformations, however, the input features z0subscript𝑧0z_{0} play a crucial role in defining the global orientation of zNsubscript𝑧𝑁z_{N}. To let the orientation vary on a per-image basis, the generator should have the ability to transform z0subscript𝑧0z_{0} based on 𝐰𝐰{\bf w}. This motivates us to introduce a learned affine layer that outputs global translation and rotation parameters for the input Fourier features (Figure 4b and Appendix F). The layer is initialized to perform an identity transformation, but learns to use the mechanism over time when beneficial; in config h this improves the FID slightly.
items.zh: 等变生成器层非常适合建模未对齐和任意方向的数据集，因为引入到中间特征 zi 的任何几何变换都将直接传递到最终图像 zN。然而，由于层本身引入全局变换的能力有限，输入特征 z0 在定义 zN 的全局方向方面起着关键作用。为了让方向在每个图像的基础上变化，生成器应该能够基于 w 变换 z0。这促使我们引入一个学习的仿射层，为输入傅里叶特征输出全局平移和旋转参数（图 4b 和附录 F）。该层初始化为执行恒等变换，但随着时间的推移，当有益时会学习使用该机制；在配置 h 中，这略微改善了 FID。

items.en: Our changes have improved the equivariance quality considerably, but some visible artifacts still remain as our accompanying videos demonstrate. On closer inspection, it turns out that the attenuation of our filters (as defined for config g) is still insufficient for the lowest-resolution layers. These layers tend to have rich frequency content near their bandlimit, which calls for extremely strong attenuation to completely eliminate aliasing.
items.zh: 我们的更改显著提高了等变性质量，但如我们的随附视频所示，仍然存在一些可见的伪影。仔细检查后发现，我们的滤波器（如配置 g 所定义）的衰减对于最低分辨率层仍然不足。这些层往往在其频带极限附近具有丰富的频率内容，这需要极强的衰减才能完全消除混叠。

items.en: So far, we have used the rigid sampling rate progression from StyleGAN2, coupled with simplistic choices for filter cutoff fcsubscript𝑓𝑐f_{c} and half-width fhsubscript𝑓ℎf_{h}, but this need not be the case; we are free to specialize these parameters on a per-layer basis. In particular, we would like fhsubscript𝑓ℎf_{h} to be high in the lowest-resolution layers to maximize attenuation in the stopband, but low in the highest-resolution layers to allow matching high-frequency details of the training data.
items.zh: 到目前为止，我们使用了 StyleGAN2 的刚性采样率递进，以及滤波器截止频率 fc 和半宽度 fh 的简单选择，但情况并非必须如此；我们可以自由地在每层基础上专门化这些参数。特别是，我们希望 fh 在最低分辨率层中较高，以最大化阻带中的衰减，但在最高分辨率层中较低，以允许匹配训练数据的高频细节。

items.en: The new layer specifications again improve translation equivariance (config t), eliminating the remaining artifacts. A further ablation (Figure 3, right) shows that ft,0subscript𝑓𝑡0f_{t,0} provides an effective way to trade training speed for equivariance quality. Note that the number of layers is now a free parameter that does not directly depend on the output resolution. In fact, we have found that a fixed choice of N𝑁N works consistently across multiple output resolutions and makes other hyperparameters such as learning rate behave more predictably. We use N=14𝑁14N=14 in the remainder of this paper.
items.zh: 新的层规范再次提高了平移等变性（配置 t），消除了剩余的伪影。进一步的消融（图 3，右）表明，ft,0 提供了一种有效的方法来权衡训练速度和等变性质量。请注意，层数现在是一个自由参数，不直接依赖于输出分辨率。事实上，我们发现固定的 N 选择在多个输出分辨率下一致工作，并使其他超参数（如学习率）的行为更可预测。在本文的其余部分，我们使用 N=14。

items.en: We obtain a rotation equivariant version of the network with two changes. First, we replace the 3×\times3 convolutions with 1×\times1 on all layers and compensate for the reduced capacity by doubling the number of feature maps. Only the upsampling and downsampling operations spread information between pixels in this config. Second, we replace the sincsinc\operatorname{sinc}-based downsampling filter with a radially symmetric jincjinc\operatorname{jinc}-based one that we construct using the same Kaiser scheme (Appendix C). We do this for all layers except the two critically sampled ones, where it is important to match the potentially non-radial spectrum of the training data. These changes (config r) improve EQ-R without harming FID, even though each layer has 56% fewer trainable parameters.
items.zh: 我们通过两个更改获得了网络的旋转等变版本。首先，我们将所有层上的 3×3 卷积替换为 1×1，并通过将特征图数量加倍来补偿容量的减少。在此配置中，只有上采样和下采样操作在像素之间传播信息。其次，我们将基于 sinc 的下采样滤波器替换为基于径向对称 jinc 的滤波器，该滤波器使用相同的 Kaiser 方案构建（附录 C）。我们对所有层（两个临界采样层除外）执行此操作，在临界采样层中，匹配训练数据的潜在非径向频谱很重要。这些更改（配置 r）在不损害 FID 的情况下提高了 EQ-R，尽管每层的可训练参数减少了 56%。

items.en: We also employ an additional stabilization trick in this configuration. Early on in the training, we blur all images the discriminator sees using a Gaussian filter. We start with σ=10𝜎10\sigma=10 pixels, which we ramp to zero over the first 200k images. This prevents the discriminator from focusing too heavily on high frequencies early on. Without this trick, config r is prone to early collapses because the generator sometimes learns to produce high frequencies with a small delay, trivializing the discriminator’s task.
items.zh: 我们在此配置中还采用了一个额外的稳定技巧。在训练早期，我们使用高斯滤波器模糊判别器看到的所有图像。我们从 σ=10 像素开始，在前 200k 张图像中将其逐渐减小到零。这可以防止判别器在早期过度关注高频。如果没有这个技巧，配置 r 容易早期崩溃，因为生成器有时会以微小延迟学习产生高频，从而使判别器的任务变得微不足道。

items.en: In Section 3.1 we disabled a number of StyleGAN2 features. We can now turn them on one by one to gauge their effect on our generators (Figure 5, right). While mixing regularization can be re-enabled without any ill effects, we also find that styles can be mixed quite reliably even without this explicit regularization (Appendix A). Re-enabling noise inputs or relying on StyleGAN2’s original layer specifications compromises equivariances significantly, and using fixed Fourier features or re-enabling path length regularization harms FID. Path length regularization is in principle at odds with translation equivariance, as it penalizes image changes upon latent space walk and thus encourages texture sticking. We suspect that the counterintuitive improvement in equivariance may come from slightly blurrier generated images, at a cost of poor FID.
items.zh: 在第 3.1 节中，我们禁用了一些 StyleGAN2 功能。现在我们可以逐一启用它们，以评估它们对我们生成器的影响（图 5，右）。虽然可以重新启用混合正则化而没有任何不良影响，但我们也发现即使没有这种显式正则化，样式也可以相当可靠地混合（附录 A）。重新启用噪声输入或依赖 StyleGAN2 的原始层规范会显著损害等变性，而使用固定傅里叶特征或重新启用路径长度正则化会损害 FID。路径长度正则化原则上与平移等变性相矛盾，因为它惩罚了潜在空间行走时的图像变化，从而鼓励纹理粘附。我们怀疑等变性的反直觉改善可能来自略微模糊的生成图像，但以较差的 FID 为代价。

items.en: In a scaling test we tried changing the number of feature maps, observing that equivariances remain at a high level, but FID suffers considerably when the capacity is halved. Doubling the capacity improves result quality in terms of FID, at the cost of almost 4×\times training time. Finally, we consider alternatives for our windowed Kaiser filter. Lanczos is competitive in terms of FID, but as a separable filter it compromises rotation equivariance in particular. Gaussian leads to clearly worse FIDs.
items.zh: 在缩放测试中，我们尝试更改特征图的数量，观察到等变性保持在高水平，但当容量减半时，FID 显著恶化。将容量加倍会以几乎 4 倍的训练时间为代价提高 FID 方面的结果质量。最后，我们考虑了窗口化 Kaiser 滤波器的替代方案。Lanczos 在 FID 方面具有竞争力，但作为可分离滤波器，它特别损害了旋转等变性。高斯导致明显更差的 FID。

items.en: We compare StyleGAN3-R to an alternative where the rotation part is implemented using p​4𝑝4p4 symmetric G-CNN [16, 17] on top of our StyleGAN3-T. This approach provides only modest rotation equivariance while being slower to train. Steerable filters [63] could theoretically provide competitive EQ-R, but the memory and training time requirements proved infeasible with generator networks of this size.
items.zh: 我们将 StyleGAN3-R 与另一种替代方案进行比较，该替代方案使用基于我们 StyleGAN3-T 的 p4 对称 G-CNN [16, 17] 实现旋转部分。这种方法仅提供适度的旋转等变性，同时训练速度较慢。可转向滤波器 [63] 理论上可以提供有竞争力的 EQ-R，但内存和训练时间要求对于这种规模的生成器网络来说是不可行的。

items.en: Appendix A demonstrates that the spectral properties of generated images closely match training data, comparing favorably to several earlier architectures.
items.zh: 附录 A 表明，生成图像的频谱特性与训练数据紧密匹配，与几种早期架构相比具有优势。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Example internal representations (3 feature maps as RGB) in StyleGAN2 and our generators.
items.capZh: 图 6：StyleGAN2 和我们的生成器中的示例内部表示（3 个特征图作为 RGB）。

full.secZh: 5 局限性、讨论与未来工作

items.en: In this work we modified only the generator, but it seems likely that further benefits would be available by making the discriminator equivariant as well. For example, in our FFHQ results the teeth do not move correctly when the head turns, and we suspect that this is caused by the discriminator accidentally preferring to see the front teeth at certain pixel locations. Concurrent work has identified that aliasing is detrimental for such generalization [59].
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们只修改了生成器，但似乎通过使判别器也具有等变性可能会获得进一步的好处。例如，在我们的 FFHQ 结果中，当头部转动时，牙齿不会正确移动，我们怀疑这是由于判别器意外地倾向于在某些像素位置看到前牙。同时进行的工作已经确定混叠对此类泛化是有害的 [59]。

items.en: Our alias-free generator architecture contains implicit assumptions about the nature of the training data, and violating these may cause training difficulties. Let us consider an example. Suppose we have black-and-white cartoons as training data that we (incorrectly) pre-process using point sampling [44], leading to training images where almost all pixels are either black or white and the edges are jagged. This kind of badly aliased training data is difficult for GANs in general, but it is especially at odds with equivariance: on the one hand, we are asking the generator to be able to translate the output smoothly by subpixel amounts, but on the other hand, edges must still remain jagged and pixels only black/white, to remain faithful to the training data. The same issue can also arise with letterboxing of training images, low-quality JPEGs, or retro pixel graphics, where the jagged stair-step edges are a defining feature of the aesthetic. In such cases it may be beneficial for the generator to be aware of the pixel grid.
items.zh: 我们的无混叠生成器架构包含关于训练数据性质的隐含假设，违反这些假设可能会导致训练困难。让我们考虑一个例子。假设我们有黑白卡通作为训练数据，我们（错误地）使用点采样 [44] 进行预处理，导致训练图像中几乎所有像素都是黑色或白色，并且边缘呈锯齿状。这种严重混叠的训练数据通常对 GAN 来说是困难的，但它尤其与等变性相矛盾：一方面，我们要求生成器能够通过亚像素量平滑地平移输出，但另一方面，边缘必须保持锯齿状，像素只能是黑色/白色，以保持对训练数据的忠实。同样的问题也可能出现在训练图像的 letterboxing、低质量 JPEG 或复古像素图形中，其中锯齿状的阶梯边缘是美学的一个定义特征。在这种情况下，生成器意识到像素网格可能是有益的。

items.en: In future, it might be interesting to re-introduce noise inputs (stochastic variation) in a way that is consistent with hierarchical synthesis. A better path length regularization would encourage neighboring features to move together, not discourage them from moving at all. It might be beneficial to try to extend our approach to equivariance w.r.t. scaling, anisotropic scaling, or even arbitrary homeomorphisms. Finally, it is well known that antialiasing should be done before tone mapping. So far, all GANs — including ours — have operated in the sRGB color space (after tone mapping).
items.zh: 未来，以与层次合成一致的方式重新引入噪声输入（随机变化）可能会很有趣。更好的路径长度正则化会鼓励相邻特征一起移动，而不是完全阻止它们移动。尝试将我们的方法扩展到关于缩放、各向异性缩放甚至任意同胚的等变性可能是有益的。最后，众所周知，抗混叠应在色调映射之前进行。到目前为止，所有 GAN——包括我们的——都在 sRGB 颜色空间（色调映射后）中运行。

items.en: Attention layers in the middle of a generator [68] could likely be dealt with similarly to non-linearities by temporarily switching to higher resolution – although the time complexity of attention layers may make this somewhat challenging in practice. Recent attention-based GANs that start with a tokenizing transformer (e.g., VQGAN [18]) may be at odds with equivariance. Whether it is possible to make them equivariant is an important open question.
items.zh: 生成器中间的注意力层 [68] 可能可以通过临时切换到更高分辨率来类似地处理非线性——尽管注意力层的时间复杂度可能使这在实际中有些挑战。最近基于注意力的 GAN，从标记化变换器（例如 VQGAN [18]）开始，可能与等变性相矛盾。是否可以使它们具有等变性是一个重要的开放问题。

items.en: of (image-producing) GANs include many forms of disinformation, from fake portraits in social media [27] to propaganda videos of world leaders [50]. Our contribution eliminates certain characteristic artifacts from videos, potentially making them more convincing or deceiving, depending on the application. Viable solutions include model watermarking [67] along with large-scale authenticity assessment in major social media sites. This entire project consumed 92 GPU years and 225 MWh of electricity on an in-house cluster of NVIDIA V100s. The new StyleGAN3 generator is only marginally costlier to train or use than that of StyleGAN2.
items.zh: （生成图像的）GAN 的许多形式包括各种虚假信息，从社交媒体中的虚假肖像 [27] 到世界领导人的宣传视频 [50]。我们的贡献消除了视频中的某些特征性伪影，可能使它们更具说服力或欺骗性，具体取决于应用。可行的解决方案包括模型水印 [67] 以及主要社交媒体网站上的大规模真实性评估。整个项目消耗了 92 GPU 年和 225 MWh 的电力，在内部集群的 NVIDIA V100 上运行。新的 StyleGAN3 生成器在训练或使用方面仅比 StyleGAN2 略贵。
